Venom of the Snake  

Description

1: Increase Poison Counter by 7
2: Decrease HP when cast by 33
3: Decrease Hitpoints by 171 per tick. Max: 220 per tick

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 203 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 3 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Poison
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 15
Deletable: Yes Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: No Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You have been poisoned.
Cast on other: Soandso has been poisoned.
Effect Fades: The poison has run its course.

Game Description

Fills your target's blood with poison, causing 33 damage initially and between 171 and @3 damage every six seconds for 36 secs (6 ticks).

Items with this effect

  • Spear of Eternal Bondage
  • Spell: Venom of the Snake

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Venom of the Snake
ClassLevel
BST52
NEC34
SHM37
Expansion:

Duration:
6 ticks
  • Comments (13)
  • Sold By (23)

RE: Location, Location, Location
QuoteReply
# May 26 2003 at 5:33 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257159340
58 posts
The NPC's name is Dar Khura Ahmih, and sells a lot of poison/disease related spells. And useful not just to good types - everyone starts off indiff in Shar Vahl, so there you go :)
▲ Page top
Starn
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2003 at 4:44 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
Don't forget Starn Bearjumper in the ruined temple north of Megan's Tower in Everfrost...he's a jolly old (good) barbarian.

Figures they make the guy who sells the pesticide set up show outside of town...

stackable
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 10:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759897869
View User Forum
79 posts
thanks on the info, i now know not to recast a dot of the same type on a mob till the first wears off. seems a lot of mana to waste for the initial dd hit! live and learn, or not!
▲ Page top
stackable?
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2003 at 9:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759897869
View User Forum
79 posts
are these dot's stackable? everyone has a differnt oppinion.



Edited, Sat Jan 18 20:39:06 2003
▲ Page top
RE: stackable?
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2003 at 9:54 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781221253
Scholar
52 posts
Dots of different types stack. Fire dots and poison dots will stack for example. Also the same dot cast by two different people will also stack, if two people both cast Venom of the Snake for example. With few exceptions (chilling embrace?) dots of the same type will not stack, heat blood will not stack with boil blood for example, wether cast by one person or different people.
▲ Page top
RE: stackable?
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2003 at 9:28 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
In one of the patches, SOE made it so that multiple Shamen casting the same DoT would all be able to land one of the same DoT. So if three Shamen cast this spell on a MoB, it would get three poison DoTs on it.

I believe I tested stacking the different poison DoTs, Tainted Breath, Envenomed Breath, etc, and they WOULD stack. This was a long time ago though.
▲ Page top
